name: coding-agents
description: Coding Agents source CLI workflow for explicit .coding-agents intake, scoped assignments, finite delegation, worker-result collection, typed Contract Coverage finalization, handoff/audit, Coding Conduct, and source-change/debug gates. Primary for Coding Agents work; excludes generic edits and docs/codex-only tasks.

interface.shortDescription: Explicit Coding Agents intake, scoped assignments, supervised worker-result collection, task finalization with typed Contract Coverage, handoff/audit, and source-change/debug gates.
interface.longDescription: Local source workflow for resolving a jobsite or explicit target repository, recording .coding-agents state, and preparing parent-managed scoped assignment packets. Covers finite delegation, worker supervision, repeated worker-result collection with workflow-only lifecycle state, distinct task finalization with typed D/C/source-spec Contract Coverage, Coding Conduct, handoff/audit, source-change, debug/root-cause, repair, and context-impact review without implying resident agents are active.
defaultPrompt: Run Coding Agents intake and create supervised scoped assignment packets for this target repo.
Collect each Coding Agents worker result and record its workflow-only lifecycle disposition.
Finalize task-wide typed D/C/source-spec Contract Coverage, then audit the Coding Agents task.
